title: elephantopus senegalensis
intro: Elephantopus senegalensis, also known as elephantopus, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Elephantopus senegalensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. The herbal preparations of the plant are often made into infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
